channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'Pro-worker AI,' streaming fatalities, and other fascinating new economic studies
item.description: From artificial intelligence to fatalities from music streaming to the effects of immigrants on elderly health care, the Planet Money newsletter round...

item.title: Trump gives mixed messages about when the war with Iran will end
item.description: In a phone call with CBS News Monday, Trump said "the war is very complete." But at a separate event with Republican lawmakers, he said the U.S. still...

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: Trump hails Iran successes but offers no end date, Lebanon wants talks with Israel, and two teens are charged in NYC attack attempt.

item.title: Trump gives mixed signals on Iran war. And, how Epstein built ties to scientists
item.description: President Trump provided conflicting messages about when the U.S. and Israel's war with Iran will end. And, NPR investigates how late convicted sex of...

item.title: GLP-1s have transformed weight loss and diabetes. Is addiction next?
item.description: A large study found that people taking GLP-1 drugs like Ozempic for diabetes were less likely to be diagnosed with substance use disorder.

item.title: Georgia voters choosing a successor to Marjorie Taylor Greene in US House
Five Iranian footballers granted Australian visas after anthem protest
item.description: Concern has grown for team after one critic called them "wartime traitors" for failing to salute during the Iranian anthem.

item.title: As U.S.-Israeli war with Iran intensifies, Trump says it is "ahead of schedule"
item.description: President Trump's assurances that a rising U.S. death toll and soaring energy prices will be temporary and worth the pain are failing to assuage jitte...

item.title: Pete Hegseth, Dan Caine hold news briefing as Iran launches new attacks
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Dan Caine are holding a news briefing as Iran launched new attacks Tuesday at...

item.title: In a time of war with Iran, Americans unite in aggravation over sticker shock at the gas pump
Student who died after rush event had blood-alcohol level of 0.425%, autopsy says
item.description: Three leaders from the Delta Tau Delta fraternity were arrested on suspicion of hazing after the death of Colin Daniel Martinez.

item.title: Uber rolls out women-only option in the US
item.description: The feature allows both women riders and drivers to be matched with other women for trips on the ride-sharing app.

item.title: Family of child injured in Canada school shooting sues OpenAI
item.description: The family alleges the firm knew the perpetrator was planning a "mass casualty event" but failed to contact the authorities.

item.title: Wildflowers blanket Death Valley in best display since 2016
item.description: The California desert is seeing its most colourful display in a decade as flowers cover the region.

item.title: Volkswagen to cut 50,000 jobs as profits drop
item.description: Europe's largest carmaker said post-tax profits had dropped to their lowest level since 2016.

item.title: JetBlue ground stop lifted soon after it began
item.description: Shortly after all JetBlue flights were grounded by the FAA due to what the agency said was a JetBlue request, the carrier said it had resumed operatio...

item.title: Defiant Iran vows to keep fighting war with U.S. "as long as it takes"
item.description: Markets stem losses as Trump says Iran war will end "very soon," but Tehran says it's "prepared to continue attacking" indefinitely, and it won't let ...

item.title: Dignified transfer for Kentucky soldier who was the 7th US service member to die in Iran war
item.description: Vice President JD Vance joined the grieving family of a Kentucky man who was the seventh U.S. service member to die in combat during the Iran war as h...
